---
title: "The Rev. Maurice Erskine Hoets"
---

## The Rev. Maurice Erskine Hoets

**Dates:** (b. 1857/8 Cape of Good Hope )

### Description

Vicar of Twyford until 1900

### Biography

He married Edith Byard Smith in Cambridge in 1882.

### Letters

- Letter from March 24th [1896?][[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
